sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81954" key="peripneumoni/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιπνευμονία</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περι-πνευμονιάω</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περι-πνευμονικός</orth>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">περιπλευμ</itype>-.</entryFree>
